_help: Local-only overrides for ACEStep on this machine. Copy this file to `acestep.local.json` (sibling, gitignored) and edit. The runtime memoizes on first read — restart the demo / engine process to pick up changes.
_lora_extra_dirs_help: Additional directories scanned recursively for LoRA *.safetensors files. Adds to the primary library at MODELS_DIR/loras. Each entry is either an absolute path, a `~`-prefixed home path, or a path relative to THIS file (the project root). Useful for pointing at training output dirs or experiment folders during iteration without moving files into the primary library.
_logging_help: Structured logging for the demo backend + engine. Defaults to a pretty-printed stderr stream at INFO so local devs see the same level of output `print()` used to give them. Override via env vars (DEMON_LOG_LEVEL, DEMON_LOG_SINKS, DEMON_LOG_FILE_DIR) or this block. Sinks: `stderr_pretty` (human-readable, colorized), `stdout_json` (one JSON record per line; pod collectors / log forwarders consume this), `jsonl_file` (daily-rotated NDJSON under file_dir; held open via loguru with retention=7 days). Levels (least to most verbose): CRITICAL, ERROR, WARNING, INFO, DEBUG, TRACE. INFO is the recommended prod default — every discrete user action (prompt set, lora enable, source swap) lands here. DEBUG adds every parameter mutation (knob movement, prompt blend, timbre strength). TRACE additionally enables sampled hot-loop tick logging (governed by env DEMON_TRACE_SAMPLE_EVERY, default 50 ticks). Every record carries session_id and (when the client supplies it) client_id — those let logs be correlated to a specific browser / user.
